# Hoag Land Services — Full Context

> Professional land clearing, tree services, and fencing for residential and commercial properties in Central Florida. ISA Certified Arborist (FL-9491A). Licensed and Insured. Serving 9 counties from DeLeon Springs, FL since 2017.

## Company Overview

Hoag Land Services (HLS) was formally established in 2019 by CEO Tyler Hoag, though operations began as early as 2017. With over a decade of experience in utility forestry and construction, Tyler built the company from a single tractor serving residential clients in DeLand into a full-service site work, tree care, and fencing operation.

Today, HLS is known for its knowledgeable, driven, and durable team. As an ISA Certified Arborist (FL-9491A) and ISA Tree Risk Assessment Qualified (TRAQ) professional, Tyler ensures every project is handled with expertise, safety, and care.

### Contact Information

- Company: Hoag Land Services, LLC
- Owner: Tyler Hoag
- Phone: (386) 561-0003
- Email: tyler@hlsdeland.com
- Address: DeLeon Springs, FL 32130
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/hoaglandservices
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/hls_deland
- Google Reviews: 5.0 stars from 33 reviews
- Established: 2017

### Certifications and Credentials

- ISA Certified Arborist (FL-9491A)
- ISA Tree Risk Assessment Qualified (TRAQ)
- Licensed and Insured
- HomeAdvisor Screened and Approved

## Services

### Tree Services

Tree services performed by ISA Certified Arborist for residential and commercial properties.

- Tree Removal: Removals performed by certified arborist to ensure the safety of the jobsite and no damage to your property.
- Tree Trimming: Removal of weak, dead or dying limbs. Lifting of branches for clearance of pedestrians, buildings and vehicles. Reduction cuts for shortening stems and branches.
- Palm Pruning: Remove dead and dying lower fronds, removal of fruit clusters, remove sprouts at base.
- Tree Installation: Palms, hardwoods, evergreens. Installation of the right tree in the right place.
- Stump Grinding: Complete stump removal below grade.
- Emergency Storm Cleanup: 24/7 storm damage response and debris removal.

### Site Work and Land Clearing

Professional site preparation and land clearing for residential and commercial properties.

- Land Clearing: From an acre to hundreds of acres.
- Earthworks and Excavation: Soil removal and replacement, grading, building pads, roads, ponds, right of ways.
- Erosion Control: Installation and maintenance of silt fences, swales and culverts.
- Environmental Services: Forestry mulching/mowing, invasive tree mitigation, herbicide treatments, right of way wetland access and roads.
- Grading and Drainage: Site grading, drainage solutions, driveway installation.
- Demolition: Structure demolition and debris removal.

### Fencing Services

Professional fencing installation for residential and commercial properties.

- Wood Fencing: Wood board, privacy, barbed wire, field fence, horse fence.
- Vinyl Fencing: Privacy, picket, and ranch style.
- Aluminum Fencing: Great for estates, pools, and residential/commercial communities.
- Farm and Ranch Fencing: Agricultural and equestrian fencing solutions.

## Service Area Coverage

HLS serves 123 locations across 9 Central Florida counties:

### Volusia County (Primary)

DeLand, DeLeon Springs, Daytona Beach, Deltona, New Smyrna Beach, Ormond Beach, Port Orange, Orange City, DeBary, Edgewater, Holly Hill, South Daytona, Lake Helen, Pierson, Barberville, Seville, Ponce Inlet, Daytona Beach Shores, Oak Hill, Osteen, Enterprise, Cassadaga, Glenwood, North DeLand, West DeLand, DeLand Southwest, Ormond-by-the-Sea, Wilbur-by-the-Sea, Glencoe, Bethune Beach, Emporia, Maytown

### Flagler County

Palm Coast, Flagler Beach, Bunnell, Beverly Beach, Marineland, Espanola, Flagler Estates

### Seminole County

Sanford, Lake Mary, Longwood, Winter Springs, Oviedo, Altamonte Springs, Casselberry, Geneva, Chuluota, Midway, Wekiwa Springs, Forest City, Goldenrod, Black Hammock

### Orange County

Orlando, Apopka, Winter Garden, Winter Park, Maitland, Zellwood, Tangerine, Christmas, Bithlo

### Lake County

Mount Dora, Eustis, Tavares, Leesburg, Clermont, Sorrento, Umatilla, Astor, Altoona, Paisley, Mount Plymouth

### Putnam County

Palatka, Crescent City, Welaka, Pomona Park, Interlachen, East Palatka, San Mateo, Georgetown, Florahome, Hollister, Bostwick, Grandin, Lake Como, Putnam Hall, Fruitland, Melrose

### St. Johns County

St. Augustine, St. Augustine Beach, Hastings

### Marion County

Ocala, Belleview, Ocklawaha, Silver Springs Shores

### Brevard County

Port St. John
